mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member ( member_id, member_password, nickname, member_name, member_phone, member_email, profile_image ) VALUES ( #{memberId}, #{memberPassword}, #{nickname}, #{memberName}, #{memberPhone}, #{memberEmail}, #{profileImage} )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member WHERE nickname = #{nickname}

SELECT member_id AS memberId, member_password AS memberPassword, nickname, member_name AS memberName, member_phone AS memberPhone, member_email AS memberEmail, profile_image AS profileImage FROM member WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
